title: Q2 Product Review
body:
Meeting: Q2 Product Review
Date: July 15, 2027
Attendees: Alice Chen (Product Lead), Bob Martinez (Finance), Charlie Nguyen (Engineering)

Overview:
The team reviewed Q2 product performance, customer feedback, and progress against the product roadmap. Key metrics showed a 12% increase in user engagement and a 5% growth in paid conversions.

Decisions:
1. Approved the Q2 product launch with minor updates to the notification system.
2. Agreed to deprioritize the 'social sharing' feature due to low user demand and shift resources to performance improvements.
3. Finance will reassess Q3 budget allocations to accommodate the resource shift.

Action Items:
1. Alice Chen will update the product roadmap to reflect the deprioritized feature and adjusted priorities. (Existing task #task_101)
2. Bob Martinez will draft a Q3 budget memo outlining the revised allocations, due by July 30, 2027.

The next review is scheduled for August 15, 2027.
